title: aeschynomene stellaris
intro: Aeschynomene stellaris, also known as the star-sensitive plant or sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Aeschynomene stellaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Aeschynomene stellaris can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
